agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to review major civic project updates
agenda_briefs.summary: Council will consider a status update on significant civic projects in Burnaby. This is a proposed review of ongoing projects, not a final decision. The update covers progress on major city-building initiatives that could affect local businesses through construction impacts, new infrastructure, or changes to city services. No new rules or fees are being voted on at this time.
agenda_briefs.action_required: Monitor council's decision for potential impacts on your business operations or property.
agenda_briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Retail
agenda_briefs.source_body:
7.1
SU: SIGNIFICANT CIVIC PROJECTS - MAY 2026
Purpose: To provide a status update (SU) on significant civic projects.
agenda_briefs.article_title: Financial Management Committee Meeting Agenda — May 19, 2026

agenda_briefs.title: Council to consider 2025 Canada Community-Building Fund update
agenda_briefs.summary: Burnaby Council will consider an update on the Federal Canada Community-Building Fund Program for 2025. This is a proposed update to how the city receives and uses federal money for local infrastructure projects like roads, water systems, and community buildings. The decision has not been made yet — Council will vote on whether to accept the updated program terms.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
7.2
2025 CANADA COMMUNITY-BUILDING FUND UPDATE
Purpose: To provide an update on the Federal Canada Community-Building Fund Program for 2025.
